Team --
Donald Trump is doubling down on his assault on voting rights through his so-called "Commission on Election Integrity." He named Kansas Secretary of State Kris Kobach, whom the ACLU dubbed the "king of voter suppression," as one of its leaders.
The Trump administration and far-right Republicans are going to new extremes to lock voters out of the polls -- specifically low income voters, the elderly, those who experience disabilities, and people of color.
If people can't vote, they can't hold elected officials like Donald Trump accountable. That's why we need to make voting as easy as possible, not lock hard-working families out of the polls.
[**Click here to tell Donald Trump, Kris Kobach, and far-right Republicans to stop attacking voting rights!**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec8/2a380d31/1928050e/fe4277/3717396222/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protectthevote/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_votingrightsja")
The commission is pulling some pretty ugly tricks, everyone. It even requested private voter information, including social security data, all to silence voters and keep people away from the polls.
This is oppressive, this is un-American, and this is unacceptable. [**Add your name now to hold Donald Trump and self-serving Republicans accountable for suppressing voters and attacking our rights.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec8/2a380d31/1928050e/fe4277/3717396222/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protectthevote/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_votingrightsja")

name: The White House
subject: Americans Desperately Need Relief from Obamacare
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8f0a41ead22d3e16e62b85f0fefac0f6707cc19b814de2bab0a817027e547efd591cbc3d24a4229fcfd2dd744ae8a3a6e7230ef2e7a9e4c7

Obamacare is a burden on working families and job creators all across this Nation. If we don’t replace it, the calamity will only get worse. Americans desperately need relief. Congress needs to step up and do their job, by repealing and replacing Obamacare. The legislation working its way through Congress right now provides the choice and control people want, the affordability they need, and the quality they deserve in healthcare.

-------------

USS Gerald R. Ford: A 100,000-ton Message to the World
On Saturday, President Trump participated in the commissioning of the USS Gerald R. Ford aircraft carrier in Norfolk, Virginia. The USS Ford is the world's most advanced aircraft carrier and is a great asset to the US Navy, further cementing our position as the most powerful Navy in the world.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8f0a41ead22d3e16340a18ee97ffeac6a55df7c63619df8597ee9a81863730f7339c05048c0319cd140be3f5d4f3410b6e5afc70cfc484f8
Watch the Video
President Trump's Historic Actions to Put America First
On Sunday, Vice President Pence detailed the bold actions President Trump has taken in his first six months to restore prosperity, keep Americans safe and secure, and hold government accountable.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8f0a41ead22d3e16280b897c2f1e186552d77f7380ac9457cb96817a374711cd58260f0b0948fe31b0534cc6dbd4fd2d1ed6a97533569de1
Read More

President Trump Welcomes USS Arizona Survivors to the White House
On Friday, President Trump met with several living survivors of the USS Arizona Pearl Harbor attack and their families in the Oval Office. Some of these survivors came to visit Washington D.C. for the first time to pay tribute and respect to those honored at the Arlington National Cemetery, and the World War II, Korean, and Vietnam Memorials.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=944649021ccb636f49f51d5d64693e9a6787e3ba08b3e2bb75bd20ec1093146f084e183458c5426970b817309e841ceda73b4a8c4c5027d5
Watch the Video
Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump at the commissioning ceremony of the USS Gerald R. Ford

| July 22, 2017 (Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, President Trump and Vice President Pence welcome victims of Obamacare to the White House for a listening session. Later, the President will travel to West Virginia to attend the 2017 National Scout Jamboree.

Coming Up This Week

This week is American Heroes Week, dedicated to those who put their own lives on the line to protect American lives every day. On Tuesday, the President will deliver a very special Salute to American Heroes in Struthers, Ohio. On Wednesday, President Trump will take part in an American Legion event at the White House. On Thursday, President Trump will welcome the brave first responders from Alexandria, Virginia to the White House. On Friday, the President will travel to New York to meet with NYPD members in Long Island.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=944649021ccb636f1440eaf1ad0619fdde03a50092a144b4fb903c92e9e67641488f55802a6c9c0fae2c0a7170970e446e2d042fb69d3ec1

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Turning off Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
This is so necessary. So important. |
---
| | |

Peter,

Politicians have spent too much time bickering and not enough time listening. Enough!

I want to hear from YOU.

I want to hear from the American heartland -- the REAL America that lives outside of the DC-media fantasy bubble.

**[Now that we've passed the six-month mark of our presidency, I want you to take the Listening to America Survey to tell me the true sentiments, concerns, and interests of REAL America.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=104a88a4e5aa72ee7265f603ed77b2c1bb25604e86818ee554cb753a15c94599b620f552341a1c4ca045096bbbb8ff3f4dc3d592daf48984)**

The mainstream media and Hollywood love to tell you "how America is feeling." But they know nothing. They live in a world where you get to your keep job even if you fail to get anything done.

It's time to tune them out. It's time to shut off the noise and just LISTEN.

Just like on the campaign, I always like to go directly to the people. I asked our supporters to help prepare for our three big debates against Hillary. I asked what issues we should address. I asked for help creating our platform.

**[So please take this moment to turn off the very loud noise of Washington and take the Listening to America Survey.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=104a88a4e5aa72eea570327c48c9675662c8aad5767e43165cc4a56995eef20aeb8a693f7c113a35a45d6e3bdc72f6de604e773f7eb4e810)**

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump

name: DWS
subject: put down the phone Mr. President
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
grow up and stop the bullying >>
| |
---
| |
---
| Friend, I never imagined there would be a day where _The New York Times_ would have an index of all the times a sitting-President attacked a person or an organization on Twitter. **Unfortunately, that time has come.** And the index isn't small either -- including more than 300 logged insults. **For a private citizen, that 's called cyberbullying.** For the Commander-in-Chief, I call that disgraceful and embarrassing. Instead of leading the nation, the President is preoccupied with getting into online fights and throwing Twitter tantrums. [_**Trump 's behavior is beneath the dignity of the office of the Presidency. Call on Trump to delete his account and save the American people from his reckless online behavior.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ed4/622b7b5b/4b92724/307bc129/488439489/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170720") No one is safe from Trump's Twitter tantrums and early morning rants. International diplomacy and security issues require more than 140 characters to navigate. And yet that hasn't stopped Trump from firing off tweets aimed at countries with nuclear arsenals. **And usually, the ones facing the consequences for Trump's actions are those on the receiving end.** Private citizens have faced dangerous threats and businesses have lost millions all from one tweet. [_**It 's time for President Trump to grow up and stop the bullying. Demand Trump delete his Twitter account.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ed4/622b7b5b/4b92724/307bc129/488439489/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170720") Thank you, Debbie |

name: Geoff Burgan
subject: Shh - it's a surprise
body:
#
Team --
I wanted to make sure you saw R. Jai's note about the surprise she's planning for Andrew's birthday next week. It's been hard to hide our excitement from Andrew in the campaign office. I had to keep a perfectly straight face when I saw our numbers so far -- and thanks to you all, they were pretty incredible.
[**But we still need a few hundred more donations by Wednesday to make this birthday surprise possible. Will you chip in $38 or whatever you can afford to help us make this Andrew 's best birthday yet?**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cc/9e00690/4ddf1b5e/24036289/3549863987/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-birthday?refcode=em20170723-gb")
Read R. Jai's note explaining our plan below, and please be sure not to mention any of this to Andrew!
Bring it home,
Geoff Burgan
* * *

Team --
Andrew celebrated his 37th birthday at the Democratic National Convention a little over a year ago; and as he spoke on the day after his birthday, I remember thinking that I could not ever be more proud of him than I was in that moment.
Well, that changed this March when we launched this campaign for Governor of Florida, and again in May when we welcomed Davis Allen Gillum, our third baby, into the world. And now it seems that every day, he somehow manages to make me more proud of him and more grateful for him.
Andrew leads and lives by example. He has a heart for service and is the hardest working man I know. Even with a busy schedule on the campaign trail, he makes time to be a great husband and a wonderful father to Caroline, Jackson, and Davis.
Next week, we will celebrate Andrew's 38th birthday, and I hope you'll help me [**surprise him with the best birthday (and the best year of his life) yet.**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cc/9e00690/4ddf1b5e/24036289/3549863987/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-birthday?refcode=em20170723-gb") Now, it'll be hard to top last year's speech, but I think we can do it if we work together. Let me explain...
Andrew has had to buckle down and focus on fundraising lately and travel around the state to places like Orange County and Palm Beach. But his staff told me that if we can get 500 people to donate online by next week, he can have a whole day off to spend with our family.
[**Will you help us give Andrew his best birthday yet by chipping in $38 or whatever you can afford before our deadline next week?**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cc/9e00690/4ddf1b5e/24036289/3549863987/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-birthday?refcode=em20170723-gb")
I worked with the campaign team to make [**this special fundraising page**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cc/9e00690/4ddf1b5e/24036289/3549863987/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-birthday?refcode=em20170723-gb"), which is hidden from his account -- so Andrew doesn't even know it's coming. If you see him on the campaign trail, please be sure not to mention it. I want it to be a surprise.
Andrew works so hard to make this state better for all of us. He deserves a special day to recharge with Caroline, Jackson, and Davis.
[](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cc/9e00690/4ddf1b5e/24036288/3549863987/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-birthday?refcode=em20170721-rjai")
Thank you for making this surprise (and this campaign!) possible.
Bring it home,
R. Jai Gillum
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cc/9e00690/4ddf1b5e/24036289/3549863987/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-birthday?refcode=em20170723-gb")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cc/9e00690/4ddf1b5e/2403628b/3549863987/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cc/9e00690/4ddf1b5e/2403628a/3549863987/VEsO/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cc/9e00690/4ddf1b5e/2403628d/3549863987/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

name: Keren Charles Dongo
subject: New report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

You have to see this. The Anti-Defamation League, a major anti-bigotry and pro-civil rights organization, is out with a new report on the rightwing activists pushing misogynistic, xenophobic and white supremacist views in America. And guess what? Corey Stewart is right there on the list.

Here in Virginia, we know about Corey Stewart's divisiveness and vitriol. But this ADL report shows just how dangerous his views could be for our Commonwealth.

**Corey Stewart 's ideology just isn't what Virginia is about.** We're a fundamentally welcoming and tolerant place. We know that our diversity makes us stronger.

But if Corey ends up winning the Republican nomination, then you can bet the GOP will circle their wagons, unite behind his agenda, and start writing him big checks to defeat Tim.

**We need your help to send a message that this backwards agenda has no place in Virginia.[Will you pitch in to our campaign so we can fight for a truly welcoming Commonwealth?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=pTnr7YJCWgV4mGFZ%2BU%2BpMPVPBwaG8jHv)**

Thanks,

Keren Charles Dongo
Campaign Manager

subject: It's happening, Derek - sign on to stop repeal
body:
Stand with Democrats to protect affordable health care.
---
**Tomorrow, the Senate will vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and throw millions off their insurance. Add your name -- tell Senate Republicans to vote NO on repeal:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170724_tp_nd&source=em_20170724_tp_nd")**

Derek --

Senate Republicans are about to vote to give their millionaire friends massive tax breaks at the expense of millions of Americans' health care.

Derek, the GOP is targeting women, seniors, working people, people with chronic illnesses or disabilities -- people who need care the most. And to be frank, I think it's because Republicans find it easier to push their agenda when they don't think the people it harms will be powerful enough to stand against them.

We need to prove them wrong. We need to stand up for ourselves, our families, our friends, our communities, and everyone who is being trampled by the GOP's partisan agenda.

**Sign on to join the 206,997 Americans who've already taken action to tell Senate Republicans to vote NO on repeal, and say you'll stand with Democrats to keep fighting for affordable health care for all:**

Tom

clean_body: Derek, Polls open in less than 24 hours, and it is clear the New Hampshire Democrats are willing to do anything to prop up liberal Kevin Cavanaugh's campaign. Yesterday, the Strafford County Democrats welcomed California Liberal Maxine Waters to New Hampshire while kicking out New Hampshire press. ( ) The Chair of the New Hampshire Democratic Party, just two months ago, said that restricting press to an event supports "secrecy rather than transparency." The New Hampshire Democrats were also quick to distance themselves from the Maxine Waters event, claiming little connection between the Strafford County Democrats and the rest of the Democratic State Party. Unfortunately for that weak argument, the Chair of the Strafford County Democrats is Gene Porter - that's right, the husband of New Hampshire's Democratic Congresswoman Carol Shea-Porter. Both have donated to liberal Kevin Cavanaugh's campaign. ( ) Democrats know that having no message and supporting sanctuary cities makes it hard to win support in fair New Hampshire elections. But that doesn't stop them from bringing in failed, out of state politicians to prop up their flawed candidate against Republican David Boutin. ( ) A victory in this race is going to be powered by making sure every Republican in Senate District 16 gets out to vote - when Republicans vote, Republicans win. Derek, don't let hypocritical Democrats have a win to celebrate tomorrow night. Sign up to join our volunteer force ( ) or donate today and help us secure victory tomorrow in New Hampshire. ( ) If you live in the towns of Hooksett, Bow, Candia, Dunbarton, or Wards 1, 2, and 12 of Manchester, vote tomorrow for Republican David Boutin. Team --
We have 10 Democratic women running for re-election this cycle. That's nearly half of all women in the Senate.
Elizabeth Warren is up in Massachusetts. Without her, we wouldn't have the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, an agency that holds Wall Street and corporate billionaires accountable.
Claire McCaskill is up in Missouri. Without her, we wouldn't have one of our top supporters of reforms that would extend the Social Security and Medicare promise to future generations.
Tammy Baldwin is up in Wisconsin. Without her, we wouldn't have our first openly LGBTQ Senator and powerful advocate to let children stay on their parents' health insurance until age 26.
When the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee announced the Women's Senate Network to make sure that these women and more stay in the Senate, we knew this community would be all in.

(Senate Vote TOMORROW)_**
Team,

Mitch McConnell is planning to hold a vote on the fate of Obamacare **tomorrow.**

_The Washington Post_ called it a health care "free-for-all" \-- which means we have no idea what Republicans will ultimately vote on tomorrow and who might vote "YES."

And that's all part of Mitch McConnell's strategy, team.

[**_The New York Times_ couldn't have been more clear: "This is actually a moment of great risk" for Obamacare. We know Mitch McConnell is capable of the exact same thing. And per _The New York Times_ , with so much attention on the special counsel's Russia investigation right now, there's a real risk that "with the media spotlight shining elsewhere, the usual suspects may ram a horrible bill through."

**This is no time to let up. The final health care vote is happening TOMORROW and Senate Democrats need you to step up. Chip in $1 now to show Republicans there 's a price to pay for repealing Obamacare:

name: Jay Inslee
subject: The freeze is OVER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Manka (D), P
body:
It's never been more important to support a truly progressive candidate -- NOT a political panderer.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTE1NDY2NjAS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIwMjE4Nzc2MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) Friend, For the past six months during the legislative session, I have been unable to raise any money. Not a single dime. But now, the fundraising freeze is over, and the first thing I'm asking of you is to support Manka Dhingra. Her race is just that important. After six months and not one, but three, special sessions, the legislature was still unable to send a capital budget to my desk. It's never been more clear we need change. That's why I'm so glad Manka is running for the state Senate in the 45th LD -- it's our chance to turn our state Senate blue. Our chance to support a bold, passionate community leader. Our chance to end Republican's obstruction on some of our most important issues, like education funding and voting rights. Our chance to have a state government that joins the resistance to Trump's discriminatory and egregious efforts. And that's why I'm coming right out and telling you that I need your help to get us there. [**Will you donate $5 to Manka 's campaign today? **](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTE1NDY2NjAS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIwMjE4Nzc2MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) Manka is one of the hardest-working, most staunchly progressive people I know. And under the Trump administration, we need people like her in office more than ever. We need someone who is joining the resistance and working for real progress and change -- not political panderers who will stand in the way of important changes just to make their party happy. But I know that Republicans are going to be watching this race with a close eye -- and doing everything they can to win this seat. That's why we have to act now. [**Please, donate $5 to Manka 's campaign today -- and fight for progress in Washington. **](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTE1NDY2NjAS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIwMjE4Nzc2MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTE1NDY2NjAS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIwMjE4Nzc2MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

subject: It was "God's Will"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2773/7377f838/37170470/51fb2e80/2612169249/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | **" Even though we cannot predict God's will when it comes to natural disasters, let's prepare ourselves for God's will." \-- Congressman Rokita** Peter,

You're not going to believe it. Congressman Todd Rokita, one of the men rumored to be one of the front-runners in the Republican primary to challenge Joe next year, just called natural disasters "God's will." Fires? Floods? Earthquakes? Even the tornado in part of Congressman Rokita's district last year that ravaged the city of Kokomo -- damaging hundreds of homes, and forcing dozens of families to stitch their lives back together? According to him, that was "God's will," too.

If that sounds familiar to you, you're not alone. It's a spitting image of Richard Mourdock, the last Republican candidate to run against Joe, who also famously used the phrase, "something God intended." That's not the only way they're alike.

**Hopefully, neither of them will ever represent Indiana in the U.S. Senate -- but only with your help.[Can you chip in $5 today to keep Joe Donnelly fighting for Hoosiers, and extremist views out of the Senate?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2773/7377f838/37170470/51fb2e83/2612169249/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20170724nd&amount=10")**

For Joe, like many Hoosiers, faith guides us to treat our neighbors as we would want to be treated, particularly in times of adversity or great need. There are few worse fates that can befall a family than a natural disaster that strikes from nowhere and can destroy their home, threaten their livelihood, or harm their family. He wants to make smart investments to keep Hoosiers secure and make sure our communities are prepared at a moment's notice to respond to any calamity.

Congressman Rokita? We can't trust someone who wants to represent us but won't take the necessary steps to keep our families safe. Not someone who doesn't think of fires and tornadoes as the disasters they are, but rather as "God's will."

**We can 't afford a Richard Mourdock clone representing Indiana in the Senate. We need your help to fight back NOW and keep Joe Donnelly representing Hoosiers.**

This Senate race won't be decided by anyone other than us. [**Step up and donate $5 today to make a difference for Hoosiers.**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2773/7377f838/37170470/51fb2e83/2612169249/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20170724nd&amount=10")

Thanks,
Peter Hanscom
Campaign Manager, Donnelly for Indiana

P.S. -- Making sure we have strong, prepared folks like Joe Donnelly in the Senate fighting for Indiana means we can't wait for disaster to strike. We've got to get to work now. **[Can we count on you?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2773/7377f838/37170470/51fb2e83/2612169249/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20170724nd&amount=10")** ** ** | **[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2773/7377f838/37170470/51fb2e82/2612169249/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20170724nd&amount=25")**

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: we can't stop now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Friend,

Thanks to millions of Americans who have made their voices heard, we have slowed down the reckless Republican Trumpcare bill -- but we have not defeated it yet.

Even with the sad news of Senator McCain's illness and the Senate Parliamentarian's recent finding that parts of the bill fail to meet the fast-track 'budget reconciliation' criteria -- the procedure Republicans need to use to avoid a Democratic filibuster -- McConnell still plans to call a Trumpcare vote TOMORROW.

It makes you wonder, doesn't it? Why are Republicans so single-mindedly determined to push a plan that will leave tens of millions uninsured and is wildly unpopular even among their own voters? The answer is: massive tax cuts for powerful corporations and the very wealthy.

Massive tax cuts for wealthy, powerful donors -- and those who fund their SuperPacs -- is the single issue that unites Congressional Republicans and the Trump Administration more than any other. And that is one thing that Trumpcare accomplishes. It slashes health care spending to the bone and redistributes the "savings" to the wealthiest people and big insurance companies. It has nothing to do with Healthcare and everything to do with Wealthcare.

[**We need to expose the truth behind this reckless plan and keep up the fight to stop this bill. Will you help?**](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91bc0/70cdc2ba/4778068d/397c3c4/1080773069/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-healthcare?refcode=em072417&amount=10.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+need+to+expose+the+truth+behind+this+&utm_campaign=em072517&source=em072517")

Paul Ryan desperately needs the Senate to pass something - anything - so that Republicans can conference on a final bill that achieves this single-minded objective.

We can't stop now. Our goal is in sight, but a lot of bad things can still get in the way. Your help enables me to keep my small campaign team working to organize Marylanders and Americans across the country. [**Click here to stay involved.**](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91bc0/70cdc2ba/4778068d/397c3c5/1080773069/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-healthcare?refcode=em072417&amount=10.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+stay+involved&utm_campaign=em072517&source=em072517")

We have accomplished a great deal together, and with your help, I believe we can win this fight.

Onward,
Chris
